attributes.name: format
attributes.description: Input format.

attributes.name: simplify
attributes.description: Level of simplification applied to the expression.

attributes.name: expand
attributes.description: Whether to expand the expression.

attributes.name: displayDigits
attributes.description: Number of significant digits to display when rendering this number.

attributes.name: displayDecimals
attributes.description: Number of decimal places to display when rendering this number.

attributes.name: displaySmallAsZero
attributes.description: Threshold below which numbers are displayed as zero.

attributes.name: padZeros
attributes.description: Whether to pad displayed numbers with trailing zeros to fill the requested digits/decimals.

attributes.name: avoidScientificNotation
attributes.description: Whether to render numbers in full decimal form rather than scientific notation.

attributes.name: renderMode
attributes.description: How the math is rendered (e.g. "inline", "display").

attributes.name: createVectors
attributes.description: Whether tuple-like expressions are interpreted as vectors.

attributes.name: createIntervals
attributes.description: Whether range expressions are interpreted as intervals.

attributes.name: functionSymbols
attributes.description: Symbols treated as function names when parsing.

attributes.name: splitSymbols
attributes.description: Whether multi-character symbols are split into a product of variables.

attributes.name: parseScientificNotation
attributes.description: Whether to parse expressions like 1e3 as scientific notation.

attributes.name: displayBlanks
attributes.description: Whether blanks (placeholders) are visibly rendered.

attributes.name: assumptions
attributes.description: Assumptions applied when simplifying or comparing.

attributes.name: draggable
attributes.description: Whether the math component can be dragged on a graph.

attributes.name: layer
attributes.description: Z-order layer index when shown on a graph.

attributes.name: anchor
attributes.description: Coordinates of the anchor point used to position this component on a graph.

attributes.name: positionFromAnchor
attributes.description: Where this component sits relative to its anchor point.

properties.name: unordered
properties.description: Whether list-like values are treated as unordered.

properties.name: value
properties.description: The math expression value.

properties.name: number
properties.description: The numeric value of the expression (NaN if not a number).

properties.name: isNumber
properties.description: Whether the expression evaluates to a finite number.

properties.name: isNumeric
properties.description: Whether the expression evaluates to any number (including infinities).

properties.name: latex
properties.description: The expression rendered as a LaTeX string.

properties.name: text
properties.description: The expression rendered as a plain text string.

properties.name: numDimensions
properties.description: The number of dimensions if the math expression is interpreted as a vector or matrix.

properties.name: vector
properties.description: The math expression interpreted as a vector (its components).

properties.name: list
properties.description: The math expression interpreted as a list (its elements).

properties.name: matrixSize
properties.description: The size of the math expression as a matrix, as a [numRows, numColumns] list.

properties.name: numRows
properties.description: The number of rows when the math expression is interpreted as a matrix.

properties.name: numColumns
properties.description: The number of columns when the math expression is interpreted as a matrix.

properties.name: matrix
properties.description: The math expression interpreted as a matrix (its entries by row and column).

properties.name: rows
properties.description: The math expression interpreted as a matrix (its entries by row and column).

properties.name: columns
properties.description: The math expression interpreted as a matrix (its entries by row and column).

properties.name: numListItems
properties.description: The number of dimensions if the math expression is interpreted as a vector or matrix.

properties.description: Whether tuple-like expressions are interpreted as vectors.

properties.name: createIntervals
properties.description: Whether range expressions are interpreted as intervals.

properties.name: functionSymbols

properties.name: splitSymbols

properties.name: displayBlanks
properties.description: Whether blanks (placeholders) are visibly rendered.

properties.name: assumptions
properties.description: Assumptions applied when simplifying or comparing.

properties.description: Z-order layer index when shown on a graph.

properties.description: Whether this component is hidden from the rendered output.

properties.description: Whether this component is disabled and cannot be interacted with.

properties.name: displayDigits

properties.name: displayDecimals
properties.description: Number of decimal places to display when rendering this number.

properties.name: displaySmallAsZero
properties.description: Threshold below which numbers are displayed as zero.

properties.name: padZeros
properties.description: Whether to pad displayed numbers with trailing zeros to fill the requested digits/decimals.

properties.name: avoidScientificNotation
properties.description: Whether to render numbers in full decimal form rather than scientific notation.

properties.name: unordered
properties.description: Whether list-like values are treated as unordered.

properties.description: The math expression value.

properties.name: number
properties.description: The numeric value of the expression (NaN if not a number).

properties.name: text

properties.name: list

properties.name: matrixSize

properties.name: numRows

properties.name: numColumns
properties.description: The number of columns when the math expression is interpreted as a matrix.

properties.name: matrix
properties.description: The math expression interpreted as a matrix (its entries by row and column).

properties.name: rows
properties.description: The math expression interpreted as a matrix (its entries by row and column).

properties.name: columns

properties.name: numListItems
